Our Fleet

Our Dahabiyas

Dahabiyas are traditional sailing boats of the Nile — peaceful, private, and entirely yours.

50 metres · Up to 20 guests

Veda 1

The Grand Flagship

This beautiful 50-meter dahabiya offers a peaceful organic platform to host your personalised cruise. Two air-conditioned meeting spaces, an upper deck with 360° panoramic views, and multiple relaxation areas for workshops, yoga, and meditation.

Rooms

10 double rooms

Suites

4 suites with balconies

Bathrooms

All ensuite

Meeting

2 AC spaces · 50 pax

Library

Egypt & Awareness

Enquire about Veda 1 →

Veda 1

45 metres · Up to 20 guests

Veda 2

The Intimate Voyager

This 45-meter dahabiya is perfect for larger groups, healing retreats, company getaways, and more. Features a large upper deck with sunbathing, Bedouin corner, and a fully customisable sun deck space.

Rooms

10 double rooms

Suites

2 suites with balconies

Bathrooms

All ensuite

Upper Deck

Bedouin corner + dining

Ideal for

Retreats & getaways

Enquire about Veda 2 →

Veda 2

⊕
⊕
⊕
⊕
⊕

18 metres · Up to 10 guests

Veda 3

The Private Retreat

A cozy 18-meter dahabiya offering a peaceful floating home for smaller groups. Intimate scale, personal attention, and a beautiful upper deck with uninterrupted Nile views.

Rooms

5 rooms total

Layout

2 double · 3 twin

Bathrooms

All ensuite

Atmosphere

Intimate & private

Ideal for

Small groups & couples

55 metres · Up to 28 guests

Veda 4

The Solar Spirit

Our newest and greenest vessel. This beautiful 55-meter dahabiya is fully solar powered and sustainably built, offering a peaceful organic platform for your personalised cruise. The largest VEDA — grandeur with conscience.

Rooms

14 double rooms

Suites

4 suites with balconies

Bathrooms

All ensuite

Energy

100% solar powered

Meeting

2 AC spaces · 50 pax

Enquire about Veda 4 →

Ready to Sail?

Enjoy the River Nile,
its sacred places and healing energies.

Every itinerary is tailored around you. Choose your vessel and we'll create the rest.
